rankings.title: Does Insurance Make Markets Resilient? Flood Re and English Property Values
conditions: obtaining true build-year/eligibility data
explicitly modeling anticipation with an event-study starting at announcement
validating first-stage on insurance outcomes—premiums/quotes/takeup—even in a subsample

rankings.title: Twenty is Plenty? Road Safety Effects of Wales's Universal Speed Limit Reduction
conditions: adding a first-stage on speeds from traffic counters/telematics if possible
pre-registering a small set of primary outcomes
using randomization inference/cluster-robust methods appropriate for policy-at-region level
